changelog: Fixed: Single active changelog — removed hardcoded v1.9 duplicate section from What's New
Fixed: Rest timer auto-starts the moment a set is marked completed in active workout
Added: Biceps, Triceps, Wrist, and Forearm muscle groups in Muscle Recovery widget for PPL / Upper-Lower splits
Added: New Accent Color picker in Dashboard Quick Menu — drives dynamic app-wide accent via CSS variable
Added: react-colorful dependency; --theme-accent CSS custom property set on :root
Fixed: Existing 'Arms' recovery entries in localStorage backward-compatible on upgrade
Fixed: CapacitorUpdater version/exec guard — no more runtime crash on device
Fixed: OTA polling loop removed; plugin runs once per app foreground
Fixed: downloadProgressModal no longer stuck at 100%
Fixed: Chart timestamp sort — metrics ordered oldest-to-newest reliably
Added: Chart period filter UI (day / week / month / 3 months)
Refactored: Dashboard widget cleanup and layout stabilisation
Fix: notifyAppReady fires once via useEffect dependency reset
Fix: version.json treated as single source of truth in OTA hook
